initiative.name: HonoWarden Alpha Launch
initiative.summary: Track the remaining work to reach v0.1.0-alpha with deployable, tested, and evidence-backed increments.

labels.name: area:api
labels.description: HTTP API, protocol DTOs, compatibility behavior, and route boundaries.

labels.name: area:auth
labels.description: Authentication, sessions, token issuance, second factor, and recent-auth gates.

labels.name: area:ops
labels.description: Backup, restore, observability, release, and operator runbooks.

labels.name: area:infra
labels.description: Cloudflare resources, domain routing, email routing, and deployment wiring.

labels.name: area:docs
labels.description: Project documentation, threat model, compatibility notes, and release docs.

labels.name: area:website
labels.description: Public homepage, domain, and OSS project presentation.

labels.name: type:ops
labels.description: Operational setup, drills, automation, and release mechanics.

labels.name: type:spike
labels.description: Bounded research or validation task with a written decision.

labels.name: risk:security
labels.description: Security-sensitive work requiring explicit review evidence.

labels.name: evidence:required
labels.description: Cannot close without test, CI, deployment, or live-client evidence.

labels.name: agent:spark
labels.description: Bounded parallel task suitable for a Spark sub-agent.

labels.name: release:alpha
labels.description: Required for the v0.1.0-alpha release gate.

projects.name: HonoWarden v0.1.0-alpha
projects.summary: Finish the minimal API-only encrypted-vault sync server through Week 26 alpha acceptance.
projects.description: Primary execution project for the alpha roadmap. Scope stays intentionally narrow: official upstream clients, personal and small-team vault sync, no Web Vault, no public registration, no organization sharing, and no public file-sharing surface in the alpha window.

projects.name: Operations Readiness
projects.summary: Make backup, restore, auditability, deployment, rollback, and release operations repeatable.
projects.description: Operational hardening needed before real-secret use. Each issue should leave behind a runbook, automated check, or explicit acceptance record.

projects.name: Website and Domain
projects.summary: Launch honowarden.com and the HonoWarden-website repository with domain and email routing.
projects.description: Separate website repository and Cloudflare domain/email setup for project presentation, documentation entry points, and OSS trust signals.

issues.title: Week 20: finish backup and restore tooling
issues.description:
Complete the D1/R2 backup and restore slice.

Acceptance criteria:
- dry-run backup manifest covers D1 SQL and explicit R2 object keys
- restore plan targets fresh D1/R2 resources
- runbook explains local and remote modes, object-list limitations, and rollback expectations
- tests cover command planning and manifest validation
- full local gates and CI are recorded in the workflow final report

issues.title: Week 21: add secret-safe audit event spine
issues.description:
Create minimal auditability for auth failures, device revokes, backup actions, and operator-sensitive actions.

Acceptance criteria:
- no secret, token, password hash, encrypted vault payload, or plaintext vault content is logged
- event schema has stable names, request IDs, actor IDs when available, and safe outcome fields
- tests prove sensitive values are excluded
- docs explain retention and operational use

issues.title: Week 22: broaden compatibility regression fixtures
issues.description:
Expand fixture coverage from basic endpoint shapes to the alpha-critical flows.

Acceptance criteria:
- fixtures cover empty vault, one cipher, folder, deleted cipher, TOTP, refresh rotation, and revision conflict behavior
- matrix distinguishes fixture-only evidence from live-client evidence
- CI fails on incompatible response-shape drift

issues.title: Week 23: verify isolated multi-user dogfood
issues.description:
Prove two to three allowlisted users can use separate personal vaults without cross-user visibility.

Acceptance criteria:
- Alice/Bob style tests cover folder, cipher, device, and refresh-token isolation
- disabled user cannot password-login or refresh
- docs include synthetic-data dogfood evidence format
- no real secrets are used during dogfood

issues.title: Week 24: produce threat model and security review packet
issues.description:
Create the review packet needed before anyone stores real secrets.

Acceptance criteria:
- threat model covers assets, trust boundaries, attacker capabilities, abuse paths, and mitigations
- auth state machine and data-flow diagrams are documented
- secrets inventory distinguishes Worker secrets, D1 encrypted payloads, R2 objects, and local test values
- known limitations are explicit and user-facing

issues.title: Week 25: freeze alpha docs, upgrade, and rollback guides
issues.description:
Freeze the release surface and make installation, upgrade, rollback, and limitation docs coherent.

Acceptance criteria:
- fresh deploy guide works from a clean checkout
- migration and rollback notes are current
- unsupported feature behavior is listed
- release notes draft references evidence links, not claims without proof

issues.title: Week 26: tag v0.1.0-alpha with evidence
issues.description:
Cut the alpha release only after the release gate evidence is attached.

Acceptance criteria:
- browser extension, desktop, and mobile live-client evidence is recorded or explicitly downgraded with rationale
- backup/restore drill evidence is linked
- CI, compatibility fixtures, brand scan, and workflow verifier pass
- GitHub release and tag are created from the reviewed commit

issues.title: Provision staging and production Cloudflare resources
issues.description:
Create and record the real Cloudflare D1, R2, Worker, route, and secret configuration needed for staging and production.

Acceptance criteria:
- staging and production resource names and IDs are recorded outside source-controlled secrets
- required Worker secrets are set through secure channels
- deploy and rollback commands are documented
- local placeholder config remains safe to commit

issues.title: Set honowarden.com DNS, Worker routes, and email routing
issues.description:
Wire honowarden.com for the homepage and project email handling.

Acceptance criteria:
- apex and www route to the website Worker or Pages deployment
- security contact email routing is configured and tested
- DNS records are documented with rollback notes
- no private account identifiers are committed

issues.title: Create HonoWarden-website repository and homepage
issues.description:
Create the separate HonoWarden-website repository and ship a small Hono-based homepage.

Acceptance criteria:
- repository exists with license, README, CI, and deploy config
- homepage is a real project page, not a placeholder landing shell
- primary calls point to docs, GitHub, and security contact
- deployed URL and honowarden.com route are verified

issues.title: Record live official client compatibility evidence
issues.description:
Upgrade selected compatibility matrix rows from fixture-only to live-client evidence.

Acceptance criteria:
- exact client versions and platforms are recorded
- login, sync, folder, cipher, refresh, and second-factor flows have evidence where in scope
- failures are listed as known issues instead of being hidden
- no real secrets appear in captured evidence

issues.title: Add retention cleanup for auth attempts and second-factor challenges
issues.description:
Keep transient auth-defense tables bounded.

Acceptance criteria:
- stale auth-attempt buckets and expired login challenges can be pruned safely
- cleanup is idempotent and owner-safe
- runbook explains schedule and failure behavior

issues.title: Implement revoke-all-sessions with recent re-auth
issues.description:
Add an authenticated route to revoke all other sessions for the current user.

Acceptance criteria:
- route requires recent password authentication
- current token behavior is explicit
- refresh tokens are invalidated transactionally where possible
- tests cover self-device behavior and revoked refresh rejection

issues.title: Add TOTP disable and change flows with recent re-auth
issues.description:
Complete second-factor lifecycle management after setup and login are stable.

Acceptance criteria:
- disable and change routes require recent password authentication
- replay and stale-token behavior remains fail-closed
- sync profile state reflects changes
- tests cover invalid code, stale token, and successful lifecycle transitions

issues.title: Document backup restore drill cadence
issues.description:
Turn the Week 20 runbook into an operating habit.

Acceptance criteria:
- cadence is documented for staging and production-like resources
- drill evidence template includes source, target, timestamps, commands, and verification result
- failure escalation and abort conditions are explicit

issues.title: Create release automation and changelog template
issues.description:
Make release creation repeatable.

Acceptance criteria:
- changelog template separates features, fixes, operations, security notes, and known limitations
- tag and GitHub release commands are documented
- rollback notes are linked from the release checklist

issues.title: Track unsupported API surfaces explicitly
issues.description:
Prevent unsupported protocol surfaces from silently pretending to work.

Acceptance criteria:
- unsupported routes are listed with expected 403 or 501 behavior
- compatibility docs explain alpha non-goals
- tests cover representative unsupported surfaces

pulse.projectUpdateReminder: Monday and Friday at 18:00 Asia/Tokyo for the alpha project; Friday at 18:00 Asia/Tokyo for operations and website projects.

firstUpdate.body: Local implementation is complete through Week 25 on commit 4c13485, with GitHub Actions CI run 28798502815 passing. The alpha remains at risk until live Cloudflare resources, live official-client compatibility evidence, backup/restore drill evidence, honowarden.com routing/email evidence, and final release tagging are recorded. Next focus: Week 26 release gate, live-client evidence, staging/prod Cloudflare resources, and the HonoWarden-website launch.

documents.title: HonoWarden Tracking Overview
documents.content:
This project tracks HonoWarden through v0.1.0-alpha.

Operating rules:
- every close needs tests or explicit evidence
- fixture-only compatibility is not live-client evidence
- no real secrets in issues, comments, fixtures, logs, or screenshots
- unsupported feature surfaces must fail explicitly
- project updates are the source of truth for weekly health

Core views:
- Alpha Command Center
- Week 26 Release Gate
- Security and Ops Risk
- Agent Queue
- Evidence Missing
